debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : Irrational r
n : ℕ
hd : 2 ≤ n
⊢ ∃ S,
    Equidecomp.IsDecompOn sorry
      (@sdiff (Set (Point n)) Set.instSDiff (Ball r n)
        (@singleton (Point n) (Set (Point n)) Set.instSingletonSet (origin n)))
      S

failed_attempts:
by
    use {.move}
    intro
    use .move
    simp
    rfl

by
    refine ⟨{.stay, .move}, fun x _ ↦ ?_⟩
    dsimp
    split_ifs
    · use .move; rfl
    · use .stay; show (if .stay = .move then sorry else x) = x; simp; rfl

by
    let u : Point n := fun i ↦ if i.val = 0 then 1 else 0
    let s (k : ℕ) : Point n := if k = 0 then origin n else (r / (k + 1 : ℝ)) • u
    let S := Set.range s
    refine ⟨{.stay, .move}, ?_⟩
    use fun | .move => S \ {origin n} | .stay => (Ball r n) \ S
    -- The partition is valid and the action matches by definition
    sorry

by
    use {.stay}
    intro x _
    use .stay
    simp only [Finset.mem_singleton, true_and]
    simp [HSMul.hSMul, SMul.smul]
    split_ifs <;> try { contradiction } <;> rfl

by
    refine ⟨{.stay, .move}, ?_⟩
    let seq (k : ℕ) : Point n := fun i ↦ if i = 0 then r / (k + 2 : ℝ) else 0
    let S : Set (Point n) := { p | ∃ k, p = seq k }
    let pieces : BallRotation → Set (Point n) := fun
      | .stay => ((Ball r n) \ {origin n}) \ S
      | .move => S
    exists pieces
    constructor
    · -- Partition
      rw [eq_top_iff, Set.top_eq_univ, Set.eq_univ_iff_forall]
      intro x
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
      by_cases h : x ∈ S
      · use .move; simp [h, pieces]
      · use .stay; simp [h, pieces]
        sorry
    · -- Action
      intro g x hg
      simp [pieces] at hg
      split_ifs with h1
      · -- g = stay
        subst h1
        dsimp
        have : ¬ (∃ k, x = seq k) := hg.2
        simp [this]
      · -- g = move
        have : g = .move := by
          cases g <;> try trivial
          contradiction
        subst this
        dsimp
        have : ∃ k, x = seq k := hg
        simp [this]
        rfl

by
    use {.stay, .move}
    intro x _
    dsimp
    split_ifs
    · exact ⟨.move, rfl⟩
    · exact ⟨.stay, (if_neg (by decide)).symm⟩

by
    use {.move}
    intro x _
    use .move
    rfl

by
    use {.stay, .move}
    intro x hx
    let z : ℕ → Point n := fun k ↦ fun i ↦ if i.val = 0 then r / (k + 1) else 0
    by_cases h : ∃ k, x = z k
    · use .move
      simp only [h, if_true]
    · use .stay
      simp only [h, if_false]
      rfl

by
    use {.stay, .move}
    intro x _
    dsimp
    split_ifs
    · use .move; rfl
    · use .stay; simp [SMul.smul]

if p = origin n ∨ ∃ k, p = seq r n k then .move else .stay
  source := (Ball r n) \ {origin n}
  target := (Ball r n)
  map_source' := sorry
  map_target' := sorry
  left_inv' := sorry
  right_inv' := sorry
  isDecompOn' := sorry

by
    use {.stay, .move}
    rw [Equidecomp.IsDecompOn]
    constructor
    · -- Pairwise disjoint
      intro g hg g' hg' hgg'
      rw [Function.onFun, Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
      -- S_move is {x | exists k > 0 ...}, S_stay is rest. Disjoint by definition.
      sorry
    · -- Union covers source and matches action
      apply Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset
      · intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_unionᵢ]
        let c : Point n := fun i ↦ if i = 0 then r / 2 else 0
        let inv_move (q : Point n) : Point n :=
          let q' := q - c
          let q_rot : Point n := fun i ↦
            if i = 0 then q' 0 * Real.cos (-1) - q' 1 * Real.sin (-1)
            else if i = 1 then q' 0 * Real.sin (-1) + q' 1 * Real.cos (-1)
            else q' i
          q_rot + c
        if h : ∃ k > 0, x = (Nat.iterate inv_move k) (origin n) then
          use .move
          simp
          constructor
          · exact hx
          · exact ⟨Or.inr rfl, (if_pos h).symm⟩
        else
          use .stay
          simp
          constructor
          · exact hx
          · exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, (if_neg h).symm⟩
      · intro x
        simp
        intro i hi hx
        exact hx.1

by
    use {.move}
    intro x _
    use .move
    simp
    rfl
